-- in --
package test

templ TestScriptSimple() {
	<div>
		<h1>Test Page</h1>
		<script>
			console.log("Hello, World!");
			function test() {
				return "test";
			}
		</script>
	</div>
}

-- out --
package test

templ TestScriptSimple() {
	<div>
		<h1>Test Page</h1>
		<script>
			console.log("Hello, World!");
			function test() {
				return "test";
			}
		</script>
	</div>
}
